subject: New Buyer Lead: John Smith interested in Austin properties
body:
Zillow Lead Notification

You have a new lead!

Contact: John Smith
Email: john.smith@gmail.com
Phone: (512) 555-0142

Message: Hi, I'm John and I'm looking to buy a home in the Austin area. Budget is around $450k-$550k. Pre-approved and ready to move quickly. Interested in 3br/2ba in 78704 or 78745. When can we schedule some showings?

Property Interest: 1234 South Lamar Blvd, Austin TX 78704
Requested: Schedule a showing

Reply to this lead at zillow.com/agent-hub
